projects.title: JakePosner.com
projects.shortDescription: Original Squarespace portfolio from my web design days.
projects.description: My first portfolio site, built on Squarespace when I was working as a web designer. Represents my starting point and how far I've come since then. Ronin Ventures is the new latest and greatest.

projects.title: Wealth Architect Pro
projects.shortDescription: Investment growth calculator with loan payoff analysis.
projects.description: A comprehensive financial planning tool featuring investment projections with compound growth, periodic contributions, and multi-asset portfolio tracking. Includes a loan prepayment calculator to visualize interest savings and payoff timelines.

projects.title: Hostr
projects.shortDescription: Host parties at your favorite restaurants.
projects.description: Hostr is a platform that allows users to host parties at their favorite restaurants.

projects.title: Therapy CRM
projects.shortDescription: Modern and easy to use therapy CRM.
projects.description: A therapy CRM for Beyond ABA Therapy to manage clients, appointments and billing..

projects.title: TaskForge
projects.shortDescription: Modern and easy to use Asana clone.
projects.description: A project management tool that gives you kanban and list workflows to stay on top of your progress

projects.title: Word Search
projects.shortDescription: Classic word search puzzle with procedurally generated grids.
projects.description: A relaxing word search game with multiple difficulty levels and themed word lists. Find hidden words in any direction - horizontal, vertical, or diagonal. New puzzle generated each time you play.

projects.title: Neon Brickbreaker
projects.shortDescription: Classic arcade action reimagined with a cyberpunk aesthetic.
projects.description: A polished take on the classic Brickbreaker game featuring neon visuals, powerups, and progressive difficulty. Built with vanilla JavaScript and Canvas API for maximum performance.

projects.title: MetaKaizen.com
projects.shortDescription: Three.js metaverse experiment with animated avatar.
projects.description: The original personal metaverse experience featuring an animated 3D avatar, interactive camera controls, and atmospheric effects. A proof of concept for immersive web-based 3D environments.

projects.title: CursorDev.com
projects.shortDescription: Development tools and resources for Cursor IDE.
projects.description: A collection of development resources, tips, and tools for developers using Cursor IDE. Enhancing the AI-powered coding experience.

projects.title: TV UI
projects.shortDescription: Netflix-style streaming interface with spatial navigation.
projects.description: A full streaming service UI clone built with React, Redux Toolkit, and TypeScript. Features spatial keyboard/remote navigation, hero banners with trailers, content rows with smooth scrolling, search, and a My List feature. Designed for TV and 10-foot experiences.

projects.title: Iron Man HUD
projects.shortDescription: WebXR tactical HUD with targeting system and missile fire.
projects.description: A J.A.R.V.I.S.-inspired tactical heads-up display built with Three.js and WebXR. Features a targeting system with lock-on and missile fire, works on desktop and Meta Quest 3 VR. Single HTML file, zero dependencies beyond Three.js.

projects.title: AV Path Planner
projects.shortDescription: Autonomous vehicle path planning with live city simulation.
projects.description: A browser-based autonomous vehicle simulator featuring live city simulation with NPC traffic, 4 path planning algorithms, and real-time visualization. Built with React and TypeScript for exploring self-driving vehicle decision making.

projects.title: MLB Showdown
projects.shortDescription: Classic baseball card game brought back to life.
projects.description: A digital recreation of the classic MLB Showdown card game. Features real player rosters and stats, card-based gameplay mechanics, and a faithful recreation of the original tabletop experience in the browser.
